top_signals.title: Czechs Move Ahead With Plan to Split Up $33 Billion Utility
top_signals.summary: Shareholders voted to split up the assets of the Czech Republic’s dominant power utility, a step toward a government plan to buy out minority investors and gain full control over the company’s power production.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Microsoft investigates Office Apps, Teams file access issues
top_signals.summary: Microsoft says an ongoing incident is preventing users of its Teams collaboration platform and Office for the web cloud-based productivity suite from opening files. [...]
